text:
ADL support provided. "-" = Unknown, 0 = No setup or physical help from staff, 1 = Setup help only, 2 = One person physical assist, 3 = Two+ person physical assist, 8 = ADL activity itself did not occur during entire 7 days
228 G3A G3A_BALANCE_STAND (G3A) Balance while Standing CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: test of balance - balance while standing in last 7 days. 0 = Maintained the position as required in test, 1 = Unsteady, but able to rebalance self without physical
